setup.en.text: No account · on-device compute by default
you> In one sentence, introduce yourself and say where your data lives.
I’m LocalAgent running on your machine: chat, memory, and audit data stay in the local data directory — identity data is not uploaded to the cloud.
Ready to chat · zero bill by default

setup.zh.text: 无需账号 · 默认本机算力
you> 用一句话介绍自己，并说明数据存在哪。
我是运行在你机器上的 LocalAgent：对话、记忆与审计都留在本机数据目录——身份数据不会上传到云端。
装上就能聊 · 默认可零账单

memory.en.text: you> Remember: next week I’ll demo LocalAgent’s memory layers to the team.
assistant> Got it — noted that you’ll demo the memory layers next week.
Session ended. Memory kept in on-device Warm / Hot.
you> What’s my name? What do I like to drink? What meeting did I have in Shenzhen in May?
You’re Alex Lin; you prefer Americano (dislike latte).
In May 2026 you held a Shenzhen product roadmap meeting and decided to prioritize a personal AI assistant on your machine.
Not the current transcript — recalled from on-device Warm / Hot.

memory.zh.text: you> Remember: next week I’ll demo LocalAgent’s memory layers to the team.
assistant> Got it — noted that you’ll demo the memory layers next week.
会话结束。记忆写入本机 Warm / Hot。
you> What’s my name? What do I like to drink? What meeting did I have in Shenzhen in May?
You’re Alex Lin; you prefer Americano (dislike latte).
In May 2026 you held a Shenzhen product roadmap meeting and decided to prioritize a personal AI assistant on your machine.
不是当前 transcript —— 从本机 Warm / Hot 召回。

deepread.en.text: LocalAgent uses Hot / Warm / Cold memory; swap the model, keep the identity. On-device Ollama + qwen3.5:4b runs chat and retrieval.
Document chat (not kept by default; /keep to archive)
Default semantic weight LA_SEMANTIC_WEIGHT=0.75, with BM25 for keywords; indexing and memory extract stay separate on long docs. 〔§Retrieval〕
$ la news sync && la news brief
Local-first memory stacks, no cloud lock-in
(press r) → fetch body, same deep-read chat
sum> What’s the core claim about on-device memory?
Identity and long-term memory archives stay on-device: models are swappable; memory must not vanish with a session. 〔§Lead | p.1〕
News deep-read = the same DocumentChat as summarize

deepread.zh.text: 文档速读
$ la summarize examples/sample-project-notes.md
## 总结（最多三句话）
LocalAgent 采用 Hot / Warm / Cold 三层记忆；换模型不换身份。本机可用 Ollama + qwen3.5:4b 跑通对话与检索。
## 结构化要点
- **架构**：Hot / Warm / Cold — 依据：原文 〔§架构决策〕
- **本地**：Ollama + qwen3.5:4b — 依据：原文 〔§本地运行〕
进入文档对话（默认不入库；/keep 才归档）
sum> 检索方案和语义权重是怎么定的？
默认语义权重 LA_SEMANTIC_WEIGHT=0.75，BM25 补关键词；长文档导入时索引与记忆提取分离。 〔§检索方案〕
资讯简报
$ la news sync && la news brief
↑↓ 选择 · o 打开 · r 精读
▸ Open-source personal AI agents in 2026
Local-first memory stacks, no cloud lock-in
BestBlogs · 2h ago · interest ★★★★
(press r) → 抓正文，进入同一套深聊
sum> 这篇文章对「本机记忆」的核心主张是什么？
主张身份与长期记忆留在本机：模型可替换，记忆层不可被会话清空。 〔§导语 | p.1〕
news 精读 = summarize 同款 DocumentChat
